closed.title: Fibre Outage | National
closed.description: We are investigating reports of no connectivity affecting some clients on the Afrihost Fibre network using DHCP. We are working on identifying and resolving this issue as quickly as possible. We apologize for any inconvenience that this may be causing.
closed.resolution: Outage fallout has been resolved. Services are back to normal.

updates.content: Afrihost engineers have found the DHCP related issue and resolved this. Connections should be restoring now. We apologise for any inconvenience  this has caused.

closed.resolution:
June 09, 2026 at 12:50 AM
Dear ISP Partner,

Octotel engineers have completed the fibre repair works. Please have those customers still offline reboot their ont and routers and retest the connection.

Octotel sincerely apologises for any inconvenience caused and appreciate your patience during the repair process.
